evals.prompt: build feature: add user authentication with JWT tokens
evals.expected_output: Pipeline starts with project-scan stage, creates .claude/pipeline-state.json with pipeline type 'build' and all six stages (project-scan, design-doc, write-plan, subagent-dev, review, verify-complete) set to pending, then dispatches a project-scan subagent.

evals.prompt: I already have a design doc at docs/specs/auth.md and a plan at docs/plans/auth-plan.md. Just implement, review, and verify.
evals.expected_output: Pipeline detects skip request, marks project-scan, design-doc, and write-plan as 'skipped' in state, asks user for existing output paths, then dispatches subagent-dev starting from Stage 4 with the provided design doc and plan paths as context.

evals.prompt: 새 기능 구현: 대시보드에 실시간 알림 기능 추가해줘
evals.expected_output: Pipeline triggers on Korean trigger phrase, creates state file with the feature description, runs full six-stage pipeline starting from project-scan, presents gates after design-doc (user approves specs), after write-plan (user approves plan), and after review (user approves findings) before proceeding.
